scope: Additive schema columns (last_recalled_at, recall_count) + recall stamping GUC + mark_stale() curation function. No change to scoring path, embedding, or RRF fusion logic.
justification: recall_hybrid/recall_lessons/navigate_locate/navigate_expand: scoring formula unchanged (STABLE→VOLATILE only for side-effect). Stamping CTE runs after SELECT materialises — no effect on returned rows or scores. mark_stale() is a new function with no impact on recall@k. Additive columns with DEFAULT NULL/0 — no existing rows affected. pg_regress recall_recency covers T1–T9.
schema_change_detail: ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS last_recalled_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NULL; ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS recall_count BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0; CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS ix_pgmnemo_lesson_recall_recency.
recall_ranking_impact: zero — stamp runs after final_results materialised; GUC off restores byte-identical v0.9.4 behaviour
verification: pg_regress recall_recency: T1–T9 pass. make installcheck REGRESS=recall_recency.
